title: Lumen — a from-scratch path tracer
description: A physically based Monte-Carlo path tracer built from scratch in TypeScript: a SAH bounding volume hierarchy, GGX microfacet BSDFs with VNDF sampling, smooth dielectrics, next-event estimation with multiple importance sampling, a multi-threaded Web Worker pool, progressive accumulation, ACES tone mapping, and an edge-avoiding À-Trous denoiser — global illumination on the CPU, in your browser.
